source_name: User distilled premium web UI prompt set
content:
# User distilled premium web UI prompt set - Overview

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: premium landing page composition, AI product homepage, SaaS marketing page, portfolio bento, agency homepage, product launch page
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-28/premium-web-ui-prompts

Visual traits:
- varied section rhythm
- large media feature rows
- asymmetric bento grids
- controlled logo cloud opacity
- large stat numbers
- testimonial glass cards
- strong CTA footer

Use when:
- premium landing page composition
- AI product homepage
- SaaS marketing page
- portfolio bento
- agency homepage
- product launch page

Avoid when:
- all cards same size
- too many sections with identical centered layout
- table-like stats
- overloaded logo cloud
- hover-only content on mobile
- generic feature grid with no media hierarchy

AI summary: Premium landing page section composition: use varied rhythm across hero, logo cloud, feature chess, bento grid, stats, testimonials, portfolio/journal, parallax gallery, and CTA footer. Avoid identical card grids; mix media, asymmetry, large type, and restrained glass.

source_name: User distilled premium web UI prompt set
content:
# User distilled premium web UI prompt set - Layout Rules

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: premium landing page composition, AI product homepage, SaaS marketing page, portfolio bento, agency homepage, product launch page
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-28/premium-web-ui-prompts

- Use a varied sequence such as Hero, Logo Cloud, How It Works, Capabilities, Feature Chess, Feature Grid, Stats, Testimonials, CTA Footer, Portfolio Bento, Journal, or Parallax Gallery.
- Feature rows should alternate text and media, use large headings, keep body copy short, and use glass/rounded/video media containers.
- Bento grids should not make every card the same size; use 7/5 and 5/7 columns and mix large and small cards.
- Stats should be large numbers with small labels, not table-like rows.
- Testimonials should use muted quote text, strong names, white/50 roles, and liquid-glass rounded-2xl p-8 cards.
- Logo clouds should use controlled opacity, optionally infinite horizontal slider, and avoid too many logos.

AI summary: Premium landing page section composition: use varied rhythm across hero, logo cloud, feature chess, bento grid, stats, testimonials, portfolio/journal, parallax gallery, and CTA footer. Avoid identical card grids; mix media, asymmetry, large type, and restrained glass.

content:
# User distilled premium web UI prompt set - Accessibility Notes

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: premium landing page composition, AI product homepage, SaaS marketing page, portfolio bento, agency homepage, product launch page
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-28/premium-web-ui-prompts

- Do not overload logo clouds with too many low-contrast marks.
- Keep section headings and body copy readable over media backgrounds.
- Use responsive stacking for bento and feature rows.
- Do not rely on hover-only content for mobile.
- Keep testimonials and stats semantically readable.

AI summary: Premium landing page section composition: use varied rhythm across hero, logo cloud, feature chess, bento grid, stats, testimonials, portfolio/journal, parallax gallery, and CTA footer. Avoid identical card grids; mix media, asymmetry, large type, and restrained glass.

source_name: User distilled premium web UI prompt set
content:
# User distilled premium web UI prompt set - Implementation Hints

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: premium landing page composition, AI product homepage, SaaS marketing page, portfolio bento, agency homepage, product launch page
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-28/premium-web-ui-prompts

- Use 7/5 and 5/7 desktop grid columns for bento and feature chess sections.
- Use image/video backgrounds with hover overlays in selected bento cards.
- Use large number plus small label for stats; consider serif italic or tight sans for premium contrast.
- Use liquid-glass rounded-2xl p-8 for dark testimonial cards.
- Use white/inverted logos on dark background with opacity control.
- Use one primary CTA in the footer and keep copy short.

AI summary: Premium landing page section composition: use varied rhythm across hero, logo cloud, feature chess, bento grid, stats, testimonials, portfolio/journal, parallax gallery, and CTA footer. Avoid identical card grids; mix media, asymmetry, large type, and restrained glass.
